principle: Unfinished work remains in the implementation pipeline with an executable next action; it is not reported as an unmanaged blocker.

stages.evidence: Planning repository audit validation passed before app execution.
Mock provider route produces MDR packet, routing decision, validation result, token accounting, and execution record.
scripts/advance-pipeline.sh ollama-port-handoff reported that Ollama is not listening on 11434.
LEMONADE_BUILD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=240 scripts/advance-pipeline.sh lemonade-runtime-start started the pinned CPU-only Lemonade service on 127.0.0.1:13305.
scripts/advance-pipeline.sh lemonade-runtime-verify passed against /api/v1/models and loopback-only Compose configuration.

stages.command: FIREWORKS_API_KEY=<secret> python3 -m amd_hackathon_app.cli run-scenario --scenario reasoning-escalation-boundary --provider fireworks
stages.evidence: Fireworks is wired as a first-class remote provider through OpenAI-compatible chat completions and the phi-fireworks-balanced profile pair. Local preflight detects FIREWORKS_API_KEY when present. The corrected key successfully listed serverless models. App route verification selected Fireworks with accounts/fireworks/models/deepseek-v4-flash for reasoning-escalation-boundary and returned a validation-passing completion with token usage recorded.
stages.next_action: Run profile-pair benchmarks across Ollama Cloud and Fireworks remotes.

stages.command: python3 -m amd_hackathon_app.cli run-scenario --scenario classification-basic --profile ollama-cloud-balanced --provider ollama_cloud --model nemotron-3-ultra:cloud
stages.evidence: Ollama Cloud returned docs for classification-basic with nemotron-3-ultra:cloud and qwen3-coder:480b-cloud, validation passed, and both runs were recorded in SQLite.
stages.next_action: Run benchmark matrices with nemotron-3-ultra:cloud and qwen3-coder:480b-cloud as temporary remote models while Fireworks remains unavailable.

stages.evidence: Local UI serves / and /api/state on 127.0.0.1:8765, splits Demo, Smoke Tests, Profiles, and Results, supports profile-pair demo/benchmark runs, preserves provider/model smoke tests, and includes Ollama Cloud plus Fireworks profile pairs.
stages.next_action: Use the UI to compare local, Ollama Cloud, and Fireworks profiles across benchmark suites.

stages.evidence: Original prompt seed models were checked. Phi-4-mini-instruct-GGUF is downloaded and benchmarkable. Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-GGUF is listed as downloaded but failed GGUF loading. LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct-GGUF is a registry_mismatch and must not be reported under a substituted ID.
stages.next_action: Benchmark with Phi and audited local GGUF models while carrying Qwen cache integrity and LFM2.5 seed-ID mismatch as model-source verification items.

stages.evidence: audit/ollama-gguf-import-status.json found 10 GGUF model blobs in the Ollama cache, classified into small, mid, and large local-model tiers. None matched the original seed IDs.
stages.next_action: Stage selected Ollama GGUF blobs through Lemonade extra_models_dir and benchmark them under their own model identities and tiers.

stages.evidence: Initial local benchmark with Phi passed classification, failed strict JSON validation, and confirmed reasoning boundary should normally escalate.
stages.next_action: Verify Fireworks provider, then run routed benchmarks without forcing local.
Advance only after benchmark evidence selects exactly one local model and organiser packaging constraints are known.
